narrative:
West Chester Twp 16 (precinct in Butler County) has 886 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
